step.title: Cleaning up temp folders from previous zip deployments and extracting pushed zip file /tmp/zipdeploy/dfbeb43f-bd50-499a-aaf5-8930e164e028.zip (0.16 MB) to /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted
ChmodRecursive Process exited with total time taken in ms: 30
Executing external process
step.arguments: -c "oryx build /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted -o /home/site/wwwroot --platform nodejs --platform-version 18 -p virtualenv_name= --log-file /tmp/build-debug.log -i /tmp/8dd69030fee9f37 -p compress_node_modules=tar-gz | tee /tmp/oryx-build.log ; exit $PIPESTATUS "

step.text: NODE_ENV=production is not supported in the .env file. Only NODE_ENV=development is supported to create a development build of your project.
